board.race_name: BOOK A WINNING DEAL FOR 15 STAKES
EIGHT TO GLORY, PRESENTED BY LENOVO
PRIX DE LA SOURCE DE BUGLOSE
HOMING DOGS WITH WISBECH GREYHOUND TRUST
TOTE FOR THE WIN B STAKES

G:KIK:11:2026-07-08.comment: 6. ZOOS KAYA has missed the frame at her last two but did run well three back when third (29.91) in an A5 at this track. Can turn form around here. 1. LARKINS LASSIE has been in the placings at her last two runs, most recently when third (30.00) in an A5 over 480m at this track. Can improve sharply here. 2. ROSALILA turned in a moderate effort last time when fifth at this track over 480m behind Cashel Misty (30.59) in an A6. Key runner who gets her chance to atone. 3. FEED ME CADBURYS placed two back in an A5 at this track then was not far away from trap four last start when third (30.24) over 480m at this track.

runners.name: CUSHIE STORM
runners.comment: Won two starts back won at this course over 480m. Couldn't reproduced the effort last start when he finished 3rd on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Ballinure Paddy beaten 2 lengths (30.46) in an A6. Likely to find this too tough.

runners.name: ROSALILA
runners.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 5th on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Cashel Misty beaten 6 lengths (30.59) in an A6. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

runners.name: FEED ME CADBURYS
runners.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (30.24) over 480m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: COMER TOM
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 480m at this track. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

runners.name: LARKINS LASSIE
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd on July 1 over 480m at this track behind One Barney beaten 9 lengths (30.00) in an A5. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

runners.name: ZOOS KAYA
runners.comment: Last start finished 4th over 480m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.55) behind Cashel Misty in an A6 on July 1. Should be right in the finish.

G:MEA:10:2026-07-08.comment: 6. JAZZY HOPE caught the eye with a sensational early split last time, setting up a 5 length win at Ballarat over 545m in 30.83. Winner at her latest appearance in the quickest time on the card. Great chance to get the job done again. 1. NO MORE EXTRAS hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 1.5 lengths (25.64) over 450m at Warrnambool. Consistent performer from this draw with a win and two minor placings to his credit. Leading chance again. 2. OPAL WHISPER struggled in tougher grade last start at Sandown, but prior to that won by one length at this track (30.76) beating Neena Bale in a Grade 5 on June 24. Form from her last run is proving to be solid. One of the main contenders. 4. DOONGALLA GHOST was in the money last start and likely to feature again.

runners.name: NO MORE EXTRAS
runners.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.64 last start, beating Paw Olyslagers. Likes the rails so can make it back to back wins.

runners.name: DOONGALLA GHOST
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when third behind Amron Tommy at Shepparton last start over 450m (25.95). Has good early speed and will stick on.

runners.name: OPAL WHISPER
runners.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 30.76, beating Neena Bale. Last start finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 8 lengths (30.39) behind Smaller Acts in a Grade 5 on June 29. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: JAZZY HOPE
runners.comment: Good performance to win by 5 lengths at Ballarat over 545m (30.83) beating Big Boy Cooper in Grade 5 on June 27. That last win was in the quickest time on the card. Stick with her.

runners.name: BELFAST SPOT
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 500m at Bendigo. Prepared to overlook.

G:MNM:8:2026-07-08.comment: 1. NAMETAB ORION won again in an impressive display after leading them home for his three straight win. Goes up another grade but expected to to measure up again. 6. AERO DULCIE is heading the right way. Out of the placings two back then scored by 2.75 lengths last start at this track over 480m (28.63). In winning form and worth following up despite rising a grade. 4. CATCHEM FLAWLESS missed the frame but ran a useful 28.85 when fourth over 480m at this track last start in an A4. Has the ability and can measure up. 3. TROMORA DIAMOND is heading the right way. Out of the placings two back then scored by one length last start at this track over 480m (28.75). Faces stiffer opposition but hard to leave out.

runners.name: DARLEY PANTHER
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 480m at this track. Can't recommend him in this.

runners.name: AERO DULCIE
runners.comment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 480m at this track by 2.75 lengths in an A5. Expected to measure up again.

runners.name: TROMORA DIAMOND
runners.comment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 480m (28.75) beating Citadel Bob in A5 on July 2. Well performed from this box. In the mix.

runners.name: NAMETAB ORION
runners.comment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start over 480m at this track by 2.5 lengths in an A5. Flying lately and can score again.

runners.name: CATCHEM FLAWLESS
runners.comment: Most recently finished 4th on June 30 over 480m at this track behind Westway Hitman beaten 4 lengths (28.85) in an A4. Has ability and among the chances.

R:IBL:3:2026-07-08.comment: 2. ERCETIN broke through for his maiden win at this course and distance seventeen days ago. Certainly heading in the right direction and may well have enough to measure up again. 3. TASKIN KRAL scored at the second attempt here a month ago getting home by 0.5L over 1300m. Should have more improvement to come and there is plenty to like about his chances. 6. OZBEYIN RUZGARI bounced back from an underwhelming sixth (1300m) when landing a victory by 0.5L contesting a 1400m maiden here last time. Must be respected now that the penny has dropped. Another last start 1400m winner 4. UZBOYLU could well be on the scene again. Watch the market for clues.

runners.name: OZBEYIN RUZGARI
runners.comment: Most recently won by a 0.5 len at this track June 21 over 1400m defeating Yaman Ozge with 55kg at $5.25. The run before that 6th of 9 at this track on June 5 over 1300m, 5 len behind Kabalbeyi carrying 55kg at $9.95. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

runners.name: YAMANBERK
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 11 at Yil on June 26 over 1300m, 7 len behind Hosbakis carrying 59kg at $6.20. Before that 2nd of 14 at Osmangazi on June 8 over 1300m, 5 len behind Sahinyurekli with 59kg at $2.35. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: UZBOYLU
runners.comment: Most recently won by 0.9 len at this track June 21 over 1400m defeating Abimsin with 57kg at $18.50. The race before that 6th of 12 at Veliefendi All Weather on June 12 over 1300m, 6 len behind Gumussu with 57kg at $38.20. Fully tested this time around.

runners.name: ERCETIN
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start favourite; won by a nose at this track June 21 over 1400m defeating Ulusiran Beyi carrying 57kg at $1.30. Before that 3rd of 9 at this track on June 5 over 1300m, 3 len behind Kabalbeyi carrying 57kg at $9.05. Confidence high so a repeat performance is on the cards.

runners.name: AKIFBERK
runners.comment: Most recently scored a big 6 len win at Kartepe June 11 over 1200m defeating Ulu Cihan carrying 57kg at $5.70. The start before that 7th of 12 at Veliefendi All Weather on May 27 over 1200m, 9 len behind Cihanerk with 54kg at $41.80. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: TASKIN KRAL
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 5th of 13 at Yil on April 30 over 900m, 7 len behind Heyhat carrying 57kg at $5.50. Last start won by a 0.5 len at this track June 5 over 1300m defeating Nisam carrying 57kg at $3.40. Key chance likely to give a big sight.

runners.name: AYBUKET
runners.comment: Had two starts to date. At debut, ran last of 15 at this track on May 22 over 1200m, in the wet; 47 len behind Aladaglar with 57kg at $15.60. Second-up ran second last of 12 at Kartepe on June 2 over 1200m, 82 len behind Seker Inci carrying 57kg at $3.95. Right in the mix.

R:STD:1:2026-07-08.comment: 2. MR SAY brings the strongest recent line after finishing third tackling 1400m at Deauville with 6. FOOT TO THE FLOOR only a neck behind. Step to 1600m looks workable and holds leading claims. The second mentioned is improving with each start and already finished ahead of 5. MAZATLAN at Nantes before her close Deauville fourth. Represents the main danger. That other Nantes runner finished third on that occasion and may progress again tackling the longer trip. Warrants thought as makes appeal. 9. QUEEN LAGERTHA is a Persian King filly out of Sweet Zen providing her debut for Kevin Tavares. Not discounted.

runners.name: FOOT TO THE FLOOR
runners.comment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on June 26 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Lovely Warrior carrying 55kg at $14.90. The run before that 2nd of 10 at Nantes on June 16 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Gypsea carrying 56.5kg at $16. Shapes as one of the key chances.

runners.name: MAZATLAN
runners.comment: Most recently 3rd of 10 at Nantes on June 16 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Gypsea carrying 53.5kg at $4.40. The run before that 6th of 10 at La Teste De Buch on May 15 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Good Boy with 56kg at $5.50. Top chance.

runners.name: MR SAY
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start 3rd of 10 at Deauville All Weather on June 26 over 1400m, neck behind Lovely Warrior carrying 54.5kg at $24.90. The race before that 4th of 7 at Lyon-Parilly on June 13 over 1350m, 3.5 len behind Another Chance carrying 58kg at $4.90. Expected to go well.

runners.name: QUEEN LAGERTHA
runners.comment: First-starter by Persian King out of Sweet Zen. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

runners.name: CALINEDENUIT
runners.comment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran last of 12 at this track on May 5 over 1200m, on a slow track; 34 len behind Lady Chnak carrying 55kg at $79. Needs to improve sharply.

runners.name: OROPENDOLA
runners.comment: Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, ran last of 7 at Lyon-Parilly on June 13 over 1350m, 14 len behind Another Chance with 53.5kg at $29. Last start 8th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on June 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Lovely Warrior with 56kg at $136.20. Won't find this as tough so gets chance to break through.

runners.name: LADY DANAE
runners.comment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when ran second last of 12 at this track on May 5 over 1200m, on a slow track; 23 len behind Lady Chnak with 55kg at $27. Needs to improve sharply.

runners.name: DA CHOPE
runners.comment: Most recently from last on the turn 7th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on June 26 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Lovely Warrior with 58kg at $89.80. The start before that ran second last of 7 at Strasbourg on June 16 over 1400m, 8 len behind Skyridge carrying 55kg at $33. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: MARGARITA
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 10 at Nantes on June 16 over 1400m, 12 len behind Gypsea carrying 55kg at $28. The run before that 6th of 9 at Toulouse on June 8 over 1400m, 9 len behind Europe with 56kg at $9.60. Very hard to entertain.

G:CNP:5:2026-07-08.comment: 1. WEST ON PASH recorded her 2nd career win last time at this track, scoring by 3.5 lengths (30.22). Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. In great recent form and expected to measure up again. 2. CANYA REDLINE was well back throughout but attacked the line strongly to place, 7 lengths from the winner (30.26) at this track in Novice race. His last run is a proven strong form reference. Expecting another good run. 3. LUCY'S DREAM took advantage of the inside draw with an all-the-way win last start (30.31) at this track in a Maiden over 520m. Winner at her latest appearance in one of the quickest times on the card. Has hit winning form and can measure up again. 8. SOUL SURFER has strong claims after a top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: WEST ON PASH
runners.comment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 30.22 with a 3.5 lengths win at this track over 520m. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.name: LUCY'S DREAM
runners.comment: Recorded her 1st career win last time out (30.31) at this track and drawn box 3 for the first time here. Should have the speed for this.

runners.name: CANYA REDLINE
runners.comment: Has been consistent, placing at his last 4 starts. Latest effort finished 3rd in a Novice race on May 30 over 520m at this track behind Canya Caviar beaten 7 lengths (30.26). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

runners.name: SOUL SURFER
runners.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 400m at Mandurah clocking 22.78. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: WHITE KEYS
runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 20 lengths behind Twin Fin over 520m. Prepared to overlook.

runners.name: OFF SHORE
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on July 2 over 400m at Mandurah in a Novice race. Others favoured this time.

runners.name: STRATTON DRIVE
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.72) in a Novice race, finishing a 6 length sixth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

runners.name: RUPEE'S SPECIAL
runners.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (30.65) over 520m at this track. Deserves respect.

runners.name: DAILY DRIVER
runners.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 520m at this track. That followed a win two back in 29.89 beating Boom Panther over 520m at this track. Others have better credentials.

runners.name: EXILE DANCER
runners.comment: Most recently finished last over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (31.12) behind West On Pash in a Novice race on July 1. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

G:BAL:10:2026-07-08.comment: 1. REVITALISE jumped cleanly last start and led all the way (22.21) at Warrnambool in a Grade 5 over 390m. Well placed and can measure up. 4. ASTON WARRIOR turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 390m behind Quest For Style (22.64) in a Grade 5. Should be in this for a long way. 6. TRICKY DISCO ran the fastest on the card last time scoring by 6 lengths (22.61) at Geelong. Deserved serious consideration again. 2. BELAIR BLUE has strong claims after a long-odds top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: ROLLING EXPRESS
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (16.93) at big odds over 300m at Healesville. Draws an inside box and can measure up.

runners.name: ASTON WARRIOR
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on July 1 over 390m at this track behind Quest For Style beaten 7 lengths (22.64). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: LAKEVIEW MITCH
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (23.17) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 12 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks one of the chances.

runners.name: REVITALISE
runners.comment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start over 390m at Warrnambool by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5. In hot form and can take this out.

runners.name: TRICKY DISCO
runners.comment: Effortless winner leading throughout to score by 6 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Geelong, clocking a fast 22.61 over the 400m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

runners.name: BELAIR BLUE
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.63) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

runners.name: HIGHWAY HOOLIGAN
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 425m at Traralgon. Tested under these conditions.

runners.name: HARLOW'S BOY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Hard to envisage a win.

R:SCV:5:2026-07-08.comment: 6. PEEPING TOM closed last campaign with three consecutive minor placings and is back today after a break of nine weeks. Should camp just off the leaders. Placed only try this trip and likely to feature. 3. FUTURE PROSPECT returns after 11 weeks in the paddock. Closed the last campaign with a fourth over 1900m at Greyville. Good chance to break through. 7. AUGRABIES is yet to break through in 18 runs. Finished fifth at his last appearance over 2000m at Greyville All Weather on June 3. Solid top-three chance on his best figures. 9. ACTION THRILLER finished 8 lengths away in fifth at his last appearance over 2000m at Greyville All Weather on June 17. Cannot be ruled out in this suitable assignment.

runners.name: PEEPING TOM
runners.comment: Resuming today after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation third of 7 at Greyville All Weather May 6 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Vixens War with 58.5kg at $3.30. Previously first up; second last of 12 at Greyville All Weather October 7 over 1400m, 14 len behind Twocantango carrying 55kg at $9. Placed last three before a break including only try this trip. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

runners.name: FUTURE PROSPECT
runners.comment: Resuming today after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Greyville April 24 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Gold Gold Baby carrying 60kg at $11. When resuming last campaign tenth of 15 at this track January 11 over 1200m, 7 len behind Scarlet Starlet with 60kg at $51. Winning hope.

runners.name: AUGRABIES
runners.comment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 11 at Greyville All Weather on June 3 over 2000m, 3 len behind Skipper O'malley carrying 50.7kg at $4.30. The start before that 4th of 7 at Greyville All Weather on May 6 over 2000m, 9 len behind Vixens War carrying 60kg at $13.50. Major player on recent form.

runners.name: ACTION THRILLER
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1600m, 3 len behind Quandura with 57kg at $67. Last start 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 8 len behind Gimme The Truth with kg at $4.50. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: BOURBON'S BEAST
runners.comment: At the latest run 3rd of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 7 len behind Gimme The Truth with kg at $9. The start before that 8th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Quandura with 60kg at $4.50. Likely to struggle.

runners.name: FIRE FORCE
runners.comment: Returns from a 52-day let-up. Last start 7th of 11 at this track on May 17 over 1750m, 4 len behind Full Monty with 55.4kg at $11. The run before that ran second last of 11 at Greyville All Weather on April 17 over 1800m, 13 len behind Wonderful Tonight with 59kg at $7. Should go well in this line up.

runners.name: APACHE AG
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at Greyville on June 13 over 2400m, 6 len behind Vihaan's Bomb with 48.2kg at $34. The race before that 6th of 11 at this track on May 17 over 1750m, 2.5 len behind Full Monty with 57.5kg at $9. Among the winning hopes on best form.

runners.name: CAPTIVE PRINCE
runners.comment: At the latest run 7th of 11 at Greyville All Weather on June 22 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Let It Roll carrying 60kg at $17. The race before that 7th of 10 at Greyville on May 2 over 1600m, 6 len behind Director with 60kg at $34. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

runners.name: LACRYMA CHRISTI
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 9 len behind Gimme The Truth carrying kg at $126. Before that 8th of 10 at this track on May 17 over 1200m, 14 len behind Pritti United with 53.5kg at $101. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: A M C VOTER
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming ran second last of 12 at this track on April 26 over 1400m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Viking Leader with 60kg at $151. Second run from a spell ran last of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 16 len behind Gimme The Truth carrying kg at $126. Wait until he shows something.

ref.race_name: BOOK A WINNING DEAL FOR 15 STAKES

G:NAM:7:2026-07-08.comment: 3. DOIN THE TON has been most effective recently in handicaps. In the money two back at this track then scored by half a length and breaking from 19m at this track over 500m (31.18). Will enjoy the 16m start. Smart handicapper who has one win and one placings from three runs from the staggered start. Genuine performer who is clearly the one to beat. 5. WOLF ECLIPSE was in the money again last time and not beaten far when second (31.11) at this track in an A6. Expected to do much better this time. 4. RACKETHALL NIFTY followed a win at this track two runs ago with a modest fourth, beaten 2.75 lengths, last start in an A5 at this track over 500m (30.66). Returns to a handicap here and will start off 7m. Happy to give her another try. 2. NIDDERDALEAUTUMN has struggling of late. Finished fifth two starts back at this track then when off the 11m mark in a handicap and was again out of the placings at this track over 500m (31.86). Will break 16m from scratch.

runners.name: WOLF ECLIPSE
runners.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (31.11) at this track over 500m. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: EVAS ANGEL
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (31.70) at this track. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

runners.name: NIDDERDALEAUTUMN
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Loco Les over 500m. Leading chance on best form.

runners.name: DOIN THE TON
runners.comment: Strong performance to win by half a length at this track over 500m (31.18) beating Honeyhill Jose in HCP on July 2. Can make it two on the bounce.

runners.name: RACKETHALL NIFTY
runners.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.75 lengths fourth (30.66) over 500m at this track. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: WALL OF SILENCE
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 500m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

ref.race_name: EIGHT TO GLORY, PRESENTED BY LENOVO

R:HAP:4:2026-07-08.comment: 5. LUCKY YEAR has been beaten under a length his past few, missing out by 0.8L at Sha Tin in his past two. Comes to Happy Valley for the first time, but he draws well and his recent form stacks right up. Racing in good order and this presents as a golden opportunity to notch up his maiden win. 1. FORZA TORO missed on the wet deck last start but was building nicely prior to that. He jumped favourite there and has since trialled well under Moreira. Been a while between drinks, but he placed in his only try at this track and trip. Can end his winning drought. 2. STURDY RUBY has had a quiet trial since missing by 0.5L at this track and trip last time out. He maps for a kind run this time around and his best form has come at this track and trip. Can go one better. 6. PRECISION HOPE can go one better today without surprising.

runners.name: FORZA TORO
runners.comment: Comes off a 52 day let-up. Last start 5th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Run Run Smart carrying 60.5kg at $3.30. The race before that 2nd of 14 at Sha Tin on April 12 over 1400m, head behind Alabama Song with 59.5kg at $6.30. Can improve on the latest effort and gets his chance.

runners.name: LUCKY YEAR
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Flying Knight carrying 57.5kg at $5.70. The race before that ran on from midfield; 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin on June 7 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Ace carrying 57kg at $9.70. Expected to feature.

runners.name: PRECISION HOPE
runners.comment: Racing well recently. At the latest run ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Legend Winner with 55kg at $3.70. The start before that 4th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind The Azure carrying 55.5kg at $8.10. Leading prospect.

runners.name: STURDY RUBY
runners.comment: At the latest run came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Viva Firecracker with 59.5kg at $16. Before that got back early 8th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 2.75 len behind The Azure carrying 61kg at $24. Well placed to play a major role.

runners.name: THE AZURE
runners.comment: Last start 6th of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 4 len behind Viva Firecracker with 57.5kg at $16. The start before that came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a neck at this track May 13 over 1650m defeating Take Action with 56kg at $11. Top-three candidate.

runners.name: PODIUM
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1200m, 2 len behind Brownneedsfurther with 54.5kg at $10. The race before that came from midfield and won by a nose at this track May 13 over 1650m defeating Setanta carrying 61kg at $8.90. Not far from the winner last time and is worth keeping safe.

runners.name: STAR ELEGANCE
runners.comment: Comes here off a 52-day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading 12th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1800m, 14 len behind Romantic Fantasy with 51kg at $37. Before that 6th of 12 at this track on April 22 over 1650m, 2.5 len behind Shooting To Top carrying 56kg at $7.40. Looking to others.

runners.name: SUPERB KID
runners.comment: At the latest run got back early 7th of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 5.5 len behind Legend Winner with 59kg at $19. The start before that 7th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1400m, 6 len behind Joyful Joy carrying 59.5kg at $56. Needs to do more. Happy to overlook.

runners.comment: Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, ran last of 7 at Lyon-Parilly on June 13 over 1350m, 14 len behind Another Chance with 53.5kg at $29. runners.name: DA CHOPE
runners.comment: Most recently from last on the turn 7th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on June 26 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Lovely Warrior with 58kg at $89.80. The start before that ran second last of 7 at Strasbourg on June 16 over 1400m, 8 len behind Skyridge carrying 55kg at $33. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: MARGARITA
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 10 at Nantes on June 16 over 1400m, 12 len behind Gypsea carrying 55kg at $28. The run before that 6th of 9 at Toulouse on June 8 over 1400m, 9 len behind Europe with 56kg at $9.60. Very hard to entertain.

G:CNP:5:2026-07-08.comment: 1. WEST ON PASH recorded her 2nd career win last time at this track, scoring by 3.5 lengths (30.22). Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. In great recent form and expected to measure up again. 2. CANYA REDLINE was well back throughout but attacked the line strongly to place, 7 lengths from the winner (30.26) at this track in Novice race. His last run is a proven strong form reference. Expecting another good run. 3. LUCY'S DREAM took advantage of the inside draw with an all-the-way win last start (30.31) at this track in a Maiden over 520m. Winner at her latest appearance in one of the quickest times on the card. Has hit winning form and can measure up again. 8. SOUL SURFER has strong claims after a top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: WEST ON PASH
runners.comment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 30.22 with a 3.5 lengths win at this track over 520m. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.name: LUCY'S DREAM
runners.comment: Recorded her 1st career win last time out (30.31) at this track and drawn box 3 for the first time here. Should have the speed for this.

runners.name: CANYA REDLINE
runners.comment: Has been consistent, placing at his last 4 starts. Latest effort finished 3rd in a Novice race on May 30 over 520m at this track behind Canya Caviar beaten 7 lengths (30.26). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

runners.name: STRATTON DRIVE
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.72) in a Novice race, finishing a 6 length sixth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

runners.name: SOUL SURFER
runners.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 400m at Mandurah clocking 22.78. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: RUPEE'S SPECIAL
runners.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (30.65) over 520m at this track. Deserves respect.

runners.name: WHITE KEYS
runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 20 lengths behind Twin Fin over 520m. Prepared to overlook.

runners.name: OFF SHORE
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on July 2 over 400m at Mandurah in a Novice race. Others favoured this time.

runners.name: DAILY DRIVER
runners.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 520m at this track. That followed a win two back in 29.89 beating Boom Panther over 520m at this track. Others have better credentials.

runners.name: EXILE DANCER
runners.comment: Most recently finished last over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (31.12) behind West On Pash in a Novice race on July 1. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

G:BAL:10:2026-07-08.comment: 1. REVITALISE jumped cleanly last start and led all the way (22.21) at Warrnambool in a Grade 5 over 390m. Well placed and can measure up. 4. ASTON WARRIOR turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 390m behind Quest For Style (22.64) in a Grade 5. Should be in this for a long way. 6. TRICKY DISCO ran the fastest on the card last time scoring by 6 lengths (22.61) at Geelong. Deserved serious consideration again. 2. BELAIR BLUE has strong claims after a long-odds top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: ROLLING EXPRESS
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (16.93) at big odds over 300m at Healesville. Draws an inside box and can measure up.

runners.name: ASTON WARRIOR
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on July 1 over 390m at this track behind Quest For Style beaten 7 lengths (22.64). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: LAKEVIEW MITCH
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (23.17) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 12 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks one of the chances.

runners.name: REVITALISE
runners.comment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start over 390m at Warrnambool by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5. In hot form and can take this out.

runners.name: TRICKY DISCO
runners.comment: Effortless winner leading throughout to score by 6 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Geelong, clocking a fast 22.61 over the 400m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

runners.name: BELAIR BLUE
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.63) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

runners.name: HIGHWAY HOOLIGAN
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 425m at Traralgon. Tested under these conditions.

runners.name: HARLOW'S BOY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Hard to envisage a win.

R:SCV:5:2026-07-08.comment: 6. PEEPING TOM closed last campaign with three consecutive minor placings and is back today after a break of nine weeks. Should camp just off the leaders. Placed only try this trip and likely to feature. 3. FUTURE PROSPECT returns after 11 weeks in the paddock. Closed the last campaign with a fourth over 1900m at Greyville. Good chance to break through. 7. AUGRABIES is yet to break through in 18 runs. Finished fifth at his last appearance over 2000m at Greyville All Weather on June 3. Solid top-three chance on his best figures. 9. ACTION THRILLER finished 8 lengths away in fifth at his last appearance over 2000m at Greyville All Weather on June 17. Cannot be ruled out in this suitable assignment.

runners.name: PEEPING TOM
runners.comment: Resuming today after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation third of 7 at Greyville All Weather May 6 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Vixens War with 58.5kg at $3.30. Previously first up; second last of 12 at Greyville All Weather October 7 over 1400m, 14 len behind Twocantango carrying 55kg at $9. Placed last three before a break including only try this trip. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

runners.name: AUGRABIES
runners.comment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 11 at Greyville All Weather on June 3 over 2000m, 3 len behind Skipper O'malley carrying 50.7kg at $4.30. The start before that 4th of 7 at Greyville All Weather on May 6 over 2000m, 9 len behind Vixens War carrying 60kg at $13.50. Major player on recent form.

runners.name: FUTURE PROSPECT
runners.comment: Resuming today after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Greyville April 24 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Gold Gold Baby carrying 60kg at $11. When resuming last campaign tenth of 15 at this track January 11 over 1200m, 7 len behind Scarlet Starlet with 60kg at $51. Winning hope.

runners.name: BOURBON'S BEAST
runners.comment: At the latest run 3rd of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 7 len behind Gimme The Truth with kg at $9. The start before that 8th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Quandura with 60kg at $4.50. Likely to struggle.

runners.name: ACTION THRILLER
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1600m, 3 len behind Quandura with 57kg at $67. Last start 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 8 len behind Gimme The Truth with kg at $4.50. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: FIRE FORCE
runners.comment: Returns from a 52-day let-up. Last start 7th of 11 at this track on May 17 over 1750m, 4 len behind Full Monty with 55.4kg at $11. The run before that ran second last of 11 at Greyville All Weather on April 17 over 1800m, 13 len behind Wonderful Tonight with 59kg at $7. Should go well in this line up.

runners.name: APACHE AG
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at Greyville on June 13 over 2400m, 6 len behind Vihaan's Bomb with 48.2kg at $34. The race before that 6th of 11 at this track on May 17 over 1750m, 2.5 len behind Full Monty with 57.5kg at $9. Among the winning hopes on best form.

runners.name: CAPTIVE PRINCE
runners.comment: At the latest run 7th of 11 at Greyville All Weather on June 22 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Let It Roll carrying 60kg at $17. The race before that 7th of 10 at Greyville on May 2 over 1600m, 6 len behind Director with 60kg at $34. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

runners.name: LACRYMA CHRISTI
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 9 len behind Gimme The Truth carrying kg at $126. Before that 8th of 10 at this track on May 17 over 1200m, 14 len behind Pritti United with 53.5kg at $101. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: A M C VOTER
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming ran second last of 12 at this track on April 26 over 1400m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Viking Leader with 60kg at $151. Second run from a spell ran last of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 2000m, 16 len behind Gimme The Truth carrying kg at $126. Wait until he shows something.

ref.race_name: BOOK A WINNING DEAL FOR 15 STAKES

G:NAM:7:2026-07-08.comment: 3. DOIN THE TON has been most effective recently in handicaps. In the money two back at this track then scored by half a length and breaking from 19m at this track over 500m (31.18). Will enjoy the 16m start. Smart handicapper who has one win and one placings from three runs from the staggered start. Genuine performer who is clearly the one to beat. 5. WOLF ECLIPSE was in the money again last time and not beaten far when second (31.11) at this track in an A6. Expected to do much better this time. 4. RACKETHALL NIFTY followed a win at this track two runs ago with a modest fourth, beaten 2.75 lengths, last start in an A5 at this track over 500m (30.66). Returns to a handicap here and will start off 7m. Happy to give her another try. 2. NIDDERDALEAUTUMN has struggling of late. Finished fifth two starts back at this track then when off the 11m mark in a handicap and was again out of the placings at this track over 500m (31.86). Will break 16m from scratch.

runners.name: WOLF ECLIPSE
runners.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (31.11) at this track over 500m. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: EVAS ANGEL
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (31.70) at this track. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

runners.name: NIDDERDALEAUTUMN
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 6 lengths behind Loco Les over 500m. Leading chance on best form.

runners.name: DOIN THE TON
runners.comment: Strong performance to win by half a length at this track over 500m (31.18) beating Honeyhill Jose in HCP on July 2. Can make it two on the bounce.

runners.name: RACKETHALL NIFTY
runners.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.75 lengths fourth (30.66) over 500m at this track. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: WALL OF SILENCE
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 500m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

ref.race_name: EIGHT TO GLORY, PRESENTED BY LENOVO

R:HAP:4:2026-07-08.comment: 5. LUCKY YEAR has been beaten under a length his past few, missing out by 0.8L at Sha Tin in his past two. Comes to Happy Valley for the first time, but he draws well and his recent form stacks right up. Racing in good order and this presents as a golden opportunity to notch up his maiden win. 1. FORZA TORO missed on the wet deck last start but was building nicely prior to that. He jumped favourite there and has since trialled well under Moreira. Been a while between drinks, but he placed in his only try at this track and trip. Can end his winning drought. 2. STURDY RUBY has had a quiet trial since missing by 0.5L at this track and trip last time out. He maps for a kind run this time around and his best form has come at this track and trip. Can go one better. 6. PRECISION HOPE can go one better today without surprising.

runners.name: FORZA TORO
runners.comment: Comes off a 52 day let-up. Last start 5th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Run Run Smart carrying 60.5kg at $3.30. The race before that 2nd of 14 at Sha Tin on April 12 over 1400m, head behind Alabama Song with 59.5kg at $6.30. Can improve on the latest effort and gets his chance.

runners.name: LUCKY YEAR
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Flying Knight carrying 57.5kg at $5.70. The race before that ran on from midfield; 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin on June 7 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Ace carrying 57kg at $9.70. Expected to feature.

runners.name: PRECISION HOPE
runners.comment: Racing well recently. At the latest run ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Legend Winner with 55kg at $3.70. The start before that 4th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind The Azure carrying 55.5kg at $8.10. Leading prospect.

runners.name: STURDY RUBY
runners.comment: At the latest run came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Viva Firecracker with 59.5kg at $16. Before that got back early 8th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 1650m, 2.75 len behind The Azure carrying 61kg at $24. Well placed to play a major role.

runners.name: THE AZURE
runners.comment: Last start 6th of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 4 len behind Viva Firecracker with 57.5kg at $16. The start before that came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a neck at this track May 13 over 1650m defeating Take Action with 56kg at $11. Top-three candidate.

runners.name: PODIUM
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on June 3 over 1200m, 2 len behind Brownneedsfurther with 54.5kg at $10. The race before that came from midfield and won by a nose at this track May 13 over 1650m defeating Setanta carrying 61kg at $8.90. Not far from the winner last time and is worth keeping safe.

runners.name: STAR ELEGANCE
runners.comment: Comes here off a 52-day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading 12th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1800m, 14 len behind Romantic Fantasy with 51kg at $37. Before that 6th of 12 at this track on April 22 over 1650m, 2.5 len behind Shooting To Top carrying 56kg at $7.40. Looking to others.

runners.name: SUPERB KID
runners.comment: At the latest run got back early 7th of 10 at this track on June 10 over 1650m, 5.5 len behind Legend Winner with 59kg at $19. The start before that 7th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1400m, 6 len behind Joyful Joy carrying 59.5kg at $56. Needs to do more. Happy to overlook.
